opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stay off the toilet, and I'm vomiting everything I try to drink. I feel completely drained.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly and I've had non-stop watery diarrhoea and vomiting for hours, and now I can't keep any fluid down at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly about 8 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 6 to 8 hours and still going
symptom_narrative.character: crampy tummy pains started first, then non-stop watery runny diarrhoea and throwing up
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel completely wiped out and drained
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the cramps are all across my belly, not in one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: keeps happening in waves, back and forth to the toilet and being sick
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; I tried an over-the-counter anti-diarrhoea tablet but it did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: every time I try to drink something I just bring it straight back up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling really nauseous, aching all over, and I felt a bit hot earlier this evening
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck between the bed and the bathroom and can't do anything

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter anti-diarrhoea tablet, tried once today with no effect

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is worried about coping and staying hydrated with no one else at home

objective_data_offered.value: felt hot and feverish earlier in the evening, hasn't measured it with a thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report of feeling feverish, no measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: mouth and lips feel very dry and hasn't passed much urine since this started
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment, not a clinical hydration examination

objective_data_offered.value: watery runny diarrhoea many times, no blood that I can see
